root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc
from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) and ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock = 0 ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type <> '09' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
